title: Data from "A constellation of dysfunctional hybrid phenotypes enforces reproductive isolation between Caenorhabditis nematode species"
author: Dall'Acqua, Maia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data from the assortative mating assay, ectopic sperm migration assay, hybrid fertility assay, spermatid morphology measurments (spermatid area, spermatid roundness, spermatid circularity and spermatid number) and hybrid male tail defect experiment. Statistical analysis of each dataset in R (R Scripts).
steps_raw: Data from the assortative mating assay, ectopic sperm migration assay, hybrid fertility assay, spermatid morphology measurments (spermatid area, spermatid roundness, spermatid circularity and spermatid number) and hybrid male tail defect experiment. Statistical analysis of each dataset in R (R Scripts).
